entry.value: Class: Rule Id/Name: AdminAccountCreation Action: run in Debug Object Browser by User spadmin

<?xml version='1.0' encoding='UTF-8'?> <!DOCTYPE ProvisioningProject PUBLIC "sailpoint.dtd" "sailpoint.dtd"> <ProvisioningProject identity="Andrew Gray"> <ExpansionItems> <ExpansionItem application="LDAPApplication" cause="ProvisioningPolicy" name="password" nativeIdentity="cn=Andrew.Gray,ou=People,dc=my-domain,dc=com" operation="Set" sourceInfo="LDAPApplication" value="eshiam@1045"/> <ExpansionItem application="LDAPApplication" cause="ProvisioningPolicy" name="sn" nativeIdentity="cn=Andrew.Gray,ou=People,dc=my-domain,dc=com" operation="Set" sourceInfo="LDAPApplication" value="Gray"/> </ExpansionItems> <MasterPlan> <ProvisioningPlan> <AccountRequest application="LDAPApplication" op="Create"/> </ProvisioningPlan> </MasterPlan> <ProvisioningPlan targetIntegration="LDAPApplication" trackingId="4774a11b87764a93a9b3de9c14a2d6e2"> <AccountRequest application="LDAPApplication" nativeIdentity="cn=Andrew.Gray,ou=People,dc=my-domain,dc=com" op="Create"> <AttributeRequest name="password" op="Set" value="eshiam@1045"> <Attributes> <Map> <entry key="secret" value="true"/> </Map> </Attributes> </AttributeRequest> <AttributeRequest name="sn" op="Set" value="Gray"/> </AccountRequest> </ProvisioningPlan> </ProvisioningProject>
